rationale: A massive, visible demonstration of armored and air strength along the border will shatter enemy morale and reinforce our resolve, proving we dictate the war’s tempo.
Large-scale live-fire drills will sharpen readiness and signal domestic and allied audiences that our military dominance is unquestionable and growing.
Covert surveillance will identify weaknesses in enemy defenses ahead of any potential escalation, ensuring we maintain operational surprise.
A robust cyber defense posture is essential to protect critical infrastructure and military networks from Tethys-led cyber operations, ensuring operational continuity amid escalating tensions.
Proactive counterintelligence measures will disrupt Tethys’s ability to infiltrate our agencies and exploit political divisions, particularly as war fatigue creates vulnerabilities.
A targeted information campaign will reinforce public resolve by highlighting Novaris’s strategic gains and framing continued resistance as vital to national survival.

Targeting key Tethys defense contractors and financial facilitators will amplify economic pressure without triggering broader retaliation, aligning with our capacity to escalate under current sanctions severity.
Seizing overseas assets of Tethys-linked oligarchs exploits our intelligence leads and delivers immediate fiscal pain, reinforcing the military-intelligence campaign while avoiding overextension.
Modest adjustment of our exchange rate will shield domestic industries from sanction spillover, preserving economic stability as military and info ops intensify.
We must exploit the stabilized frontline by demonstrating resolve and asymmetric readiness to deter further aggression and boost domestic and allied morale.
Increasing vigilance along our borders and critical infrastructure will counter imminent hybrid threats, including cyber and disinformation campaigns.
Joint exercises with Tethys will strengthen interoperability and signal unwavering commitment to collective defense amid rising war fatigue.
Given confirmed Novaris preparations for cyber and disinformation operations, hardening our networks is essential to protect critical infrastructure and maintain public trust.
Proactively identifying and neutralizing Novaris-linked agents will disrupt their hybrid warfare efforts and safeguard sensitive military and diplomatic plans.
A coordinated public messaging effort will reinforce domestic resilience and counter enemy narratives, aligning with General Bondar’s enhanced patrols and Marchetti’s legal positioning.

Given the moderate sanction level and remaining room to escalate, we must impose precision sanctions on key Novaris defense-industrial entities to degrade their war economy without triggering broader retaliation.
Seizing overseas assets of sanctioned Novaris officials and oligarchs will amplify economic pressure and signal resolve, complementing General Bondar’s show of force and Savchenko’s cyber defense.
Directing emergency funding to critical domestic sectors strengthens economic resilience, ensuring sanctions and war fatigue do not undermine our long-term stability or coalition credibility.
Leveraging our strong international support, we launch a global campaign to reaffirm the rules-based order, reinforcing the moral and legal clarity of our position amid rising war fatigue.
By convening allied partners through established institutions, we institutionalize support for Tethys and deter Novaris’s hybrid strategies, complementing cyber defense and military exercises.
Strengthening domestic unity and international image through cultural diplomacy bolsters resilience and counters disinformation, aligning with counterintelligence and financial aid efforts.
